creator: Tom Walsh
source_text:
BUTTER CHICKEN MAC N’ CHEESE

Per Serving (Makes 10)
545 Calories
42g Protein
58g Carbs
17g Fat

Slow Cooker Meal Prep Series
Episode 34

Ingredients:
900g (32oz) chicken breast, diced
2 onions, sautéed until browned
30g (2 Tbsp) tomato paste
30g (2 Tbsp) garlic paste
15g (1 Tbsp) ginger paste 
30g (2 Tbsp) butter
400g (14oz) blended fire-roasted tomatoes
15g (1 Tbsp) sugar or zero-cal sweetener

Spice blend:
2 Tbsp paprika
1 Tbsp chili powder 
1 Tbsp spicy curry powder 
2 tsp cumin
1 Tbsp salt
Dash of black pepper

High: 2–3 hours
OR
Low: 3–4 hours

672g shell pasta, cooked to 50% of box time
1 cup pasta water

400g plain 0% Greek yogurt (FAGE brand)
120g 1/3 fat cream cheese
Chopped cilantro and green onions
227 extra sharp cheddar
80g reduced fat mozzarella 
1 tsp garam masala

-

STEALTH HEALTH CONTAINERS ARE OFFICIALLY SHIPPING NATIONWIDE!!

@stealthhealthcontainers 

If you’ve followed me for a while, you know I’m obsessed with building a freezer stash of indulgent, high-protein meals.

This journey began in late 2023 when I started using brown paper take-out containers, and showing them in my videos. I was buying them in bulk off of restaurant supply websites to support my bulk meal prep efforts.

Suddenly, my DM’s were flooded:
 “Where do you get those containers??”

This was the most common question on every post I made for a year and a half. The truth was - I didn’t have a great answer. 

They never stayed in stock, most options weren’t microwave safe, and they were often lined with BPA plastics. Every option used cheap plastic lids that broke. There wasn’t a single trustworthy brand I felt good about promoting.

So I decided to make my own:

Stealth Health Containers is the world’s first fully compostable bamboo meal prep container, built for bulk meal prep. No BPA plastics, fully compostable (including the lid), freezer and microwave-safe. Incredibly sturdy and stackable.

These are the containers I personally use - and the quality difference is night and day.

Thank you all for the support and I can’t wait to see the freezer stashes you build using these 🤌🤝

#stealthhealth #mealprep #highprotein #highproteinmealprep

Accepted after series metadata and standalone slow-cooker heat timings stopped masquerading as ingredients.
